rulings.Case Title: DIANA D. SAM VS. CATALINA BOYKIN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, June 13, 2014, line 2. CROSS DEFENDANTS CENTURY 21 REALTY ALLIANCE and YING HE's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT OFF CALENDAR. Moot. = (501/LOT) - LATE TENTATIVE

rulings.Case Title: DIANA D. SAM VS. CATALINA BOYKIN et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, June 13, 2014, line 2. CROSS DEFENDANTS CENTURY 21 REALTY ALLIANCE and YING HE's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT Sustained based on uncertainty with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege and attach an enforceable contract. The Court will not rule on demurrers to the individual causes of action at this time as the arguments hinge on the existence of an enforceable contact. New arguments are raised in the reply. Moving party is ordered to fully comply with SFLR 2.6C in future. Providing the Court with two sets of the first 16 pages of the FACC is insufficient. = (501/LOT) - LATE TENTATIVE

rulings.Case Title: BRIGID CRILLY, SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO MARIE FIRL VS. ANGELA THOMAS et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, June 13, 2014, line 4. DEFENDANT ANGELA THOMAS' DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Sustained with leave to amend to allege facts showing standing as successor in interest and to assert an actionable breach. Reading paragraph C and 2(a) of the Contract - the condition precedent was satisfied. = (501/LOT) - LATE TENTATIVE

rulings.Case Title: AURORA KING et al VS. HYDE STREET HOLDING COMPANY, LLC et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, June 13, 2014, line 5. DEFENDANT HYDE STREET HOLDING COMPANY, LLC's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer based on misjoinder is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to (1) join the prior owner; or (2) allege facts showing that Hyde is liable for prior owner's wrongdoings on each cause of action; or (3) limit the allegations/damages to Hyde's ownership. Demurer based on statute of limitations is overruled. Applying the theories of continuous accrual and equitable tolling, Plaintiffs' claims have been brought within the applicable statues of limitations, i.e. last accrual date is November 2012 and claims have been brought on May 24, 2013. As to the demurrer based on the pending action, Plaintiffs may join Meridian as a defendant in this action in Plaintiffs' First Amended Complaint. Otherwise this action shall be abated until Zhigadlo v. Meridian is resolved. Plaintiffs shall file amended complaint within 10 days of notice of entry of order. Prevailing party prepare order. = (501/LOT) - LATE TENTATIVE

rulings.Case Title: SHAPIRO PROPERTIES LLC VS. DAVID DEVINE
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery, To Establish Admissions From Defendant, And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, June 13, 2014, line 10. PLAINTIFF SHAPIRO PROPERTIES LLC's Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery, To Establish Admissions From Defendant, And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion is denied as to the requests for admissions as responses have been provided. Motion is granted as to the Request for Production, Form Interrogatories and Special Interrogatories for Defendant to provide complete responses in accordance with the Discovery Act. Sanctions granted in the amount of $885. According to Exhibit A to Defendant's declaration USPS left a notice regarding undelivered mail on Thursday May 29, 2014. Discovery responses were due by the following Wednesday, June 4, 2014. According to Defendant's declaration paragraph 3, Defendant is in San Francisco on Saturdays and Sundays. Defendant cites no authority for the proposition that failure to check/pick up mail constitutes substantial justification for failure to respond to discovery. = (501/LOT) - LATE TENTATIVE
